meaning: adj.[解]位于骨内的,骨内膜的
examples: Methods: 48 failure implants was observed of 482 endosteal dental implants in 422 cases during 1993.7 to 2001.6.

Objective: to investigate the influence of load location to the strains at the tissue around endosteal implant for posterior single tooth replacement.
